mano_cua.result_summary: petStore页面500错误：TSConfck解析失败导致Vite构建错误，$api.ts composable 404无法加载，Nuxt初始化失败，页面显示原始TypeScript源码而非Pet Store数据
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page shows 500 Vite Error. TSConfckParseError causes $api.ts composable to fail (404). Nuxt app initialization fails. Page renders raw TypeScript source instead of pet store data.
